title: solanum terminale subsp. plousianthemum
intro: Solanum terminale subsp. plousianthemum, also known as the Solanum terminal, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum terminale subsp. plousianthemum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a wound healer and antimicrobial agent. Solanum terminale subsp. plousianthemum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
